title: Thembalethu police launch manhunt for gunman
description: GEORGE NEWS - Thembalethu police launched a...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Thembalethu police launched a manhunt for a gunman who shot and killed a man and wounded another in Zone 7, Thembalethu, on Saturday 30 August at about 22:30.


> According to Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies, a 53-year-old man sustained gunshot wounds to the head and was declared deceased by paramedics on scene.


A 55-year-old man sustained injuries to his head and body. He was taken to a nearby medical facility for treatment.

The motive for the killing is yet to be established and forms part of an ongoing police investigation.

Thembalethu detectives urge the public to come forward with any information which could lead to the arrest of the assailant. Anyone with information may contact the police on 044 802 8906 or Crime Stop on 08600 10111.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
